title.en: The Eternal Knowledge of the Golden Sea Tree wa...

content.en:
Countless golden runes emerged, and under the control of the Xuanyu Lord, they sealed this Eternal Knowing Golden Sea Tree.

Although the Eternal Consciousness Golden Sea Tree can release a strange impact, it is only a tree after all, not an Eternal Realm powerhouse, so in the face of the seal of the Eternal Realm, it cannot resist at all.

Soon.

The Eternal Knowledge of the Golden Sea Tree was sealed.

At the moment of sealing, the strange impact disappeared in an instant.

And the Xuanyu Lord took away the Eternal Knowing Golden Sea Tree as soon as possible, and then prepared to escape.

"Lord Xuanyu, hand over the !! of the Eternal Knowing Golden Sea Tree"

One Eternal Realm Lord after another stopped the Xuanyu Lord.

Even if the strength of the Xuanyu Lord was stronger than that of other Eternal Realms, it couldn't stop so many Eternal Realms, so it was stopped.

Thundered!!!!

The Great War has broken out!

Airplanes!!!!!!

The aftermath of the terrifying Eternal Realm battle swept around, and countless treasure resources were shattered by the aftermath of the Eternal Realm.

The place where Ye Tian was located was not very far from the place where the Eternal Realm was fighting, and it was affected at the first time.

"The speed of the Eternal Realm is too fast, they took the golden tree so quickly, if they were a little later, I could still find some resources, it's a pity!"

Ye Tian said helplessly.

Immediately, he swallowed his doppelganger into the inner world to replicate his body to withstand the aftermath of the battle in the Eternal Realm.

In this way, even if the replica body is finally annihilated, the clone will not be annihilated.

"Run!"

Ye Tian shuttled quickly, but his body was still torn apart by the aftermath of the battle in the Eternal Realm, if it weren't for the Legendary Eternal Body's Endless Eternal Body's recovery power, it would even be more terrifying than the life-saving ability of the Seven-Extreme Realm's half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse to a certain extent.

Otherwise, his group has been annihilated.

Not only Ye Tian is on the run, but other extreme realms are also on the run.

Ye Tian and the others hadn't escaped from this Void Heaven and Earth yet, and this place was cracked.

And the golden avenue was also torn apart, and countless terrifying aftermaths swept through the world.

Some supreme beings and half-step eternal realms who were watching the excitement in the outside world bore the brunt of the impact, and they were directly shocked and turned into ashes.

The endless territories began to crumble, and some of the nearby exotic worlds and even the Eternal Heavens and Realms began to be unable to withstand the aftermath of the Eternal Realm battle.

Although the rules of the Source Sea are protecting the Exotic Heaven and Earth and the Eternal Heaven and Earth, they cannot stop the impact of the Eternal Realm.

And in this case, it is simply impossible to travel through the Void.

At this time, Ye Tian had already rushed out of the Sea of Silence, but he was not far away from the aftermath of the battle in the Eternal Realm.

His flesh had been badly torn apart, but overall there was no major problem.

However, he will become like this, and he is too close to the Eternal Realm, and he has not received the information of the Eternal Realm, so he did not flee in the first place.

And those extreme realms from the space-time territory basically got the news in advance, even if it was only a second in advance, it was enough to escape.

Therefore, those extreme realms from the space-time territory have almost not fallen, but those extreme realms that come from the source sea and have not taken refuge in the eternal realm lord are miserable.

Soon, Ye Tian's copied body finally stayed away from the battlefield of the Eternal Realm battle.

Immediately, the doppelganger came out of the inner world of the replicated body, and was also injured, but it was fine.

Then, the clone returned to the Dark Forbidden Realm, and only then did he breathe a sigh of relief.

......

Lord Xuanyu was wounded, and he was seriously injured.

With so many lords besieging him, he couldn't stop him at all.

"You really want to stop me, I'm just a clone, you really have someone who doesn't have a clone, be careful that I desperately take one away!"

The Jade Lord threatened.

The Dress Lord smiled and said, "Lord Xuanyu, it's useless for you to threaten, the value of the Eternal Knowledge Golden Sea Tree is too great, whoever gets it will rise, do you think we will give up?"

None of the lords would give up, and they all wanted to kill the doppelganger of the Xuanyu Lord, so as to take away the Eternal Knowing Golden Sea Tree.

Rumble!!!!

The Xuanyu Lord was knocked away by one attack after another, and his body shattered, as if he was about to fall.

At this moment, a figure tore through the void and forcibly came to the battlefield.

I saw him slash through the air with a sword, shattering many Eternal Realm attacks, and then came to the side of the Xuanyu Lord.

Lord Xuanyu thought that there was a powerful lord who came to save him, but when he saw who it was, his face changed.

"Void Sword Lord, you're here!"

The Xuanyu Lord's expression changed drastically.

There is only one possibility for this person to come to save him, and it is also to know Jin Haishu forever.

The Void Sword Lord didn't say a word, and slashed with a sword.

The Xuanyu Lord couldn't stop it at all, and any means were useless.

Burst!!!!

This sword shattered many of the Xuanyu Lord's defenses, and every cell was completely annihilated, and even the will was completely shattered.

With just one sword, this doppelganger of the Xuanyu Lord completely fell.

Although the Xuanyu Lord was seriously injured, even if he was not seriously injured, the three swords were enough to kill him.

"Lord Void Sword, you are involved, this is not in accordance with the rules, right?"

The Spirit Crane Lord was a little dissatisfied.

The other Eternal Realm Lords also expressed their dissatisfaction, feeling that the Void Sword Lords should not be involved.

There is an unwritten rule in the Alliance of Lords, that is, an Eternal Realm Lord such as the Void Sword Lord should not participate in the chance of a hundred thousand eternal years.

This is an opportunity for ordinary Eternal Realm Lords to compete for, and besides, it is of little use to an Eternal Realm like the Void Sword Lord.

Because of this, they are qualified to snatch it, otherwise where would they have the opportunity to get such an opportunity.

"The master of the ability has robbed it, what can you do?"

The Void Sword Lord snorted coldly, and immediately took the sealed Eternal Knowing Golden Sea Tree from the body of the Xuanyu Lord's doppelganger.

During the whole process, none of the other Eternal Realm Lords dared to make a move, allowing the Void Sword Lord to take the Eternal Knowing Golden Sea Tree away.

It wasn't until the Void Sword Lords completely disappeared that these lords expressed their anger.

"Damn, the Void Sword Lord blatantly broke the unspoken rules, it's so hateful!"

"Eternal Awareness Jin Haishu is indeed qualified to attract the attention of a strong person like the Void Sword Lord, but the Void Sword Lord is definitely not for himself, Eternal Awareness Golden Sea Tree is not of much use to him, his Time and Space Lord has been upgraded to the Eternal Time and Space Territory, he should be for his little lover Qingxue Lord. "

"Hmph, Lord Qingxue's talent is not good, he was promoted to the eternal realm by him, and now he has prepared the Eternal Knowledge Golden Sea Tree for her, I am afraid that she can surpass us. "

"There's no way, who let Lord Qingxue hook up with the Void Sword Lord, when it reaches the level of the Eternal Realm, the lord who can still be affected by love, it is estimated that there is only one Void Sword Lord. "

"Let's go, we didn't take the opportunity this time, after we go back, we will report the information to the Lord Alliance, and we must let the Lord Alliance sanction the Void Sword Lord. "

"The worst thing should be the Xuanyu Lord, he lost a clone and lost the Eternal Knowing Golden Sea Tree, he is estimated to be crazy, and he can't provoke him recently!"

Soon, these Eternal Realm Lords left the Source Sea one by one.

And the area is gradually returning to calm.
